items.title: Osaka Execution Spec -- State
items.description: State management for Osaka fork. Defines State and TransientStorage classes, account CRUD operations, storage operations, state snapshotting (begin/commit/rollback_transaction), and state_root computation.

items.title: Osaka Execution Spec -- Transactions
items.description: Transaction types for Osaka: LegacyTransaction, AccessListTransaction, FeeMarketTransaction, BlobTransaction, SetCodeTransaction. Defines TX_MAX_GAS_LIMIT=16,777,216 (EIP-7825), TX_BASE_COST=21000, FLOOR_CALLDATA_COST=10, and transaction encoding/decoding/validation.
